ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Samuel Pooler appeared via zoom for Daniel Lewis (administrator).

Mr. Pooler stated that he just filed the supplemental accounting regarding the reserve. Status of distribution of reserve is continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Continued To Nov-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Continued To Sep-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Pooler, Esq., via Zoom, for Daniel James, Administrator.

Counsel advises that the IRS audit issue has been resolved. Counsel and the court discuss and confirm that he intends to file a final accounting and close the estate. Counsel requests a continuance to complete the preceding.

The subject matter is continued to Sep-25-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To Jun-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Pooler appeared by zoom for Daniels James.

Mr. Pooler stated that his client is not present because he was called in to work by the County Fire Department, that they are still working on the tax return and trying to figure it out, and that they retained a tax advocate. Mr. Pooler also stated that he and Mr. James were supposed to finalize the accounting of the reserve this morning, but were unable to do so because he got called in, and requested a 30-day continuance. Status on distribution of the reserve which is to include a supplemental accounting is continued to June 26, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is re-called and taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Continued To Mar-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Samuel Lee Pooler, Esq. for Daniel Lewis James (Petitioner).

The Court briefly addressed the status on calendar today and requested an update. Mr. Pooler stated that he had a difficult time getting information from his client, that he was hoping to have this done by tomorrow, requested a 30-day continance, and stated that if he cannot get it done by then that he may need to withdraw. Mr. Pooler confirmed that there is a reserve of $50,000.00, stated that there is an audit of the 2019 tax return, and that he would like time to reach out to the taxpayer advocate. The Court stated that it appears that following the audit that there may funds returned to the estate.

At the conclusion of comments, the status on distribution of the reserve is continued to March 13, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Daniel James Lewis is ordered to appear on March 13, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. A virtual appearance by Daniel James Lewis will be allowed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Pooler, via zoom, for Daniel James, Administrator.

Mr. Pooler reports that he has been attempting to contact his client for the past two weeks with no response but that his client has advises him some time ago that he had a meeting scheduled with the IRS but he has not received an update regarding the meeting.

After additional discussion, the Status on Distribution of the Reserve is continued to May-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a brief status report by May-18-2022 and subsequently deliver courtesy copies to the court, before the next calling of this matter.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Pooler, via ZOOM, for Daniel James, Administrator.

The court requests an update regarding communication with the IRS. Counsel reports that there have been back and forth with the IRS but they have not replied due to being backlogged because of the pandemic. Counsel reports that there is currently $325 in the estate but that the IRS may owe the estate a refund.

The Order to Appear is off calendar. The Status on Distribution of The Reserve is continued to Mar-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a brief status with the court one week prior to the next calling of this matter.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Pooler, via ZOOM, for Daniel James, Personal Representative.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of the distribution of reserve. Counsel reports that the distribution is pending due to a reported tax issue with the IRS. The court then queries counsel as to the status of an accounting or report of status. Counsel advises that he intends to file an accounting or a report of status but that he has relocated to the East Coast and will do so as soon as he receives the documents he requires, which are currently in transit to him.

The Status on Distribution of Reserve is continued to August 23, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

MINI MINUTES:

Mr. Pooler reports at the outset that the tax preparer continues to work on the issue regarding outstanding taxes owed. The court then reminds counsel that neither a supplemental accounting nor receipts have been filed. Counsel reports that he will file both as soon as possible.

After brief discussion, the Status on Distribution of the Reserve is continued to July 12, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of The Reserve
Off Calendar Mar-01-2021 Continued To May-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Video Conference:
Samuel Pooler for Daniel James.

Mr. Pooler stated there was a tax debt in 2019 and his client is trying to get that resolved, that the tax preparer is getting in touch with IRS for an audit of whether any taxes are still owed. The Court noted there is an amount of $50,000.00 still in reserve and asked if Mr. Pooler knows about how much the liability is to IRS. Mr. Pooler stated there is now only about $14,000.00 left, that it generally takes 60-90 days to get IRS issues to be resolved, and that it has already been 30 day, and requested a continuance.

The status of distribution of reserve is continued to May 24, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
